_comment: Setup-SecurityInsight-Unattended.ps1 configuration. Copy to setup-unattended.json (gitignored) in this folder, then edit. null = use script default. CLI switches override anything set here.
_Flavour_options: 'Internal' = re-uses the v1 cert-based SPN, dot-sources platform-defaults.ps1, renders bridged custom.ps1. 'Community' = creates a standalone SPN, renders inline custom.ps1.
_Sub_comment: Internal flavour: TenantId null -> $global:AzureTenantId. SubscriptionId null -> $global:MainLogAnalyticsWorkspaceSubId. Community flavour: both required.
_Resources_comment: StorageAccountName null -> auto-derived from RG. NamingSuffix appended to all 4 names if set (e.g. '-fvf' -> rg-securityinsight-fvf).
_Auth_Internal_comment: AppId null -> $global:HighPriv_Modern_ApplicationID_Azure. CertificateThumbprint null -> $global:HighPriv_Modern_CertificateThumbprint_Azure. PlatformDefaultsPath null -> auto-resolves to <repo>\..\PlatformConfiguration\config\platform-defaults.ps1. TopUpGraphPerms=true grants the 13 SI Graph perms idempotently.
_Auth_Community_comment: Used only when Flavour=Community. CredKind: Secret|Cert. CredStorage: KeyVault|LocalCertStore|Inline. KeyVaultName required when CredStorage=KeyVault.
_EntraDiag_comment: false (default) for Sentinel customers -- their existing Diagnostic Setting already streams the same categories. true for non-Sentinel customers.
_Container_comment: Enabled=true provisions ACR + Container Apps Environment + KEDA-scaled Jobs. AcrName null -> auto-derived from RG. Requires `az` CLI installed + `az login`.
_Smtp_comment: Community ONLY (Internal flavour reads SMTP from PlatformConfiguration/config/platform-defaults.ps1 -- leave Server null on Internal). Server null -> SMTP block is NOT written to custom.ps1 (customer must add manually). Port: 25=plain/STARTTLS, 465=SMTPS, 587=submission-with-STARTTLS (default). MailTo is the cross-engine default recipient list (RA + asset-tagging + ad-hoc); DetailedTo/SummaryTo override per RA mode (use MailTo when both are empty).
